expectations.evidence: Valid JSON but different schema: uses meta{}, company{}, person_company_matrix (flat dict), crz_contracts{}, red_flags{}. Missing: suppliers_investigated, buyer{}, connections[], rpvs, zlte_stopy[].
persons array contains Filip Sobol, Jan Sutiak, Tomas Polka with roles, dates, and addresses.
person_company_matrix exists but as flat dict {name: [companies]} instead of {headers: [], rows: [{role, values}]} format.
crz_contracts.cross_connections_with_buyer section present with SQL results. Also lists contracts_with_target_buyer and contracts_with_other_buyers.
No 'connections' array in output. Network connections not structured as separate field.
summary has key_findings (prose array) and recommended_next_steps, but NOT suppliers_checked/persons_found/connections_found numeric fields.
